title: Operation: Grill & Seek
location_hint: Outdoor recreational area with communal cooking facilities, Colonial Park
theme: Kid-friendly KGB spy dossier — rookie agent receives a top-secret mission at a field operative's outdoor rendezvous point

content_brief.tone_notes: Playful, age-appropriate spy thriller tone. Think junior secret agent handbook, not adult espionage. Use KGB bureau language (dossiers, operatives, codenames, missions) but keep vocabulary accessible to children aged 6+. Difficulty and terrain defaulted to 2 as none were specified by the hider.
must_include: An in-universe KGB mission briefing framing the finder as a newly recruited field operative
A reference to the BBQ/grill area as a 'covert rendezvous point' or 'field station' without naming the exact park feature
A kid-friendly challenge or puzzle element as part of the 'mission' before the final container is revealed
Sign-the-log instruction reframed as 'confirming your operative identity in the mission ledger'
A sign-off from a fictional KGB handler character (e.g., 'Handler Asad' or an invented codename)
must_avoid: Any real names of specific park features, structures, or exact hiding coordinates
Adult spy themes such as weapons, real-world geopolitics, or actual intelligence agencies
References to fire, flames, or dangerous use of the BBQ equipment — keep setting incidental, not interactive
Personally identifying information about the hider beyond the codename/handler role
